steps.title: Identify the context clue
steps.content: The passage later describes “socially dictated gender roles,” revealing how Elizabethan society established these expectations as binding, unchangeable rules for behavior.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content: The blank requires a word meaning to establish by authority. “Prescribed” does exactly this—it describes how society created and enforced rigid expectations. The other choices either interrupt (interjected), pledge (committed), or demonstrate (illustrated), none of which means to establish rules by authority. That matches choice D — D is correct.
